title: 'Arpakshad #0775
definition:
Arphaxad = "I shall fail as the breast: he cursed the breast-bottle"

 1) third son of Shem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Arphaxad = "I shall fail as the breast: he cursed the breast-bottle"

 1) third son of Shem

    NASB:  third son of Shem, also the region settled by him
